methodsAttempted.notes: Checked robots.txt for www.uri.edu and web.uri.edu; both allowed normal public paths except wp-admin.

methodsAttempted.query: site:uri.edu University of Rhode Island artificial intelligence generative AI policy academic integrity teaching guidance
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search surfaced URI ITS responsible AI guidance, Provost AI resources, a 2025 Provost syllabus memo PDF, teaching resources, and older news.

methodsAttempted.query: site:its.uri.edu AI URI LibreChat Copilot responsible use privacy data
methodsAttempted.notes: Official ITS pages identified responsible use standards, general use guidance, Generative AI service guidance, and LibreChat access information.

methodsAttempted.query: site:uri.libguides.com/ai URI AI citation academic integrity
methodsAttempted.notes: URI Libraries AI guide and citation subpage provided official library guidance on attribution, professor expectations, formal citation, and fact checking.

methodsAttempted.query: University of Rhode Island 2025 Fall Updates Syllabus Policy Memo AI syllabus statements
methodsAttempted.notes: Official Provost PDF provided explicit source-status evidence that URI did not have a university-wide generative AI coursework policy as of July 2025.

artifacts.summary: Official URI discovery found current AI-specific guidance on ITS and Provost pages, an official Provost syllabus memo, and URI Libraries AI citation guidance. Claims are narrowed to the specific evidence: preliminary responsible-use standards, data/privacy cautions, instructor/course-level AI expectations, URI-supported or vetted tools, and a July 2025 source-status statement that there was no university-wide generative AI coursework policy. An ATL resource collection and a 2023 task force news article were documented but rejected as claim evidence because they are primarily resource/news surfaces rather than binding current policy.

stopConditions: Stop after official URI pages support direct AI claim candidates.
Do not infer binding policy from optional guidance, resource lists, research/news, or faculty-facing examples.
Keep the July 2025 no-university-wide-coursework-policy statement as source_status rather than implying absence of other AI guidance.

artifacts.title: University of Rhode Island AI Policy Evidence Draft
artifacts.summary: Official URI sources found preliminary responsible-use AI guidance, privacy and data-handling standards, supported or vetted AI tool pointers, optional AI syllabus guidance, and URI Libraries citation guidance. The strongest source-status caveat is the Provost memo statement that URI did not have a university-wide generative AI coursework policy as of July 2025.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
The staged claims are agent-reviewed candidates and are not published canonical facts.
The July 2025 Provost memo addresses university-wide coursework policy status; other official URI AI guidance exists and is captured separately.
